subtitle: Tarot Divination
title: Tarot
questionPlaceholder: Enter the matter you wish to consult…
footer: Please interpret this reading in light of your question.

0.name: The Fool
0.upright: A fresh start beckons; embrace the unknown with an open heart and trust the journey.
0.reversed: Reckless choices and poor judgment may lead you astray — pause and consider the risks before leaping.

1.name: The Magician
1.upright: You have all the tools you need; focused will and skillful action can turn your vision into reality.
1.reversed: Talents go unused or are turned toward manipulation — realign your intentions with integrity.

2.name: The High Priestess
2.upright: Trust your intuition and look within; the answers you seek lie beneath the surface.
2.reversed: Hidden information or a suppressed inner voice distorts your perception — listen more deeply.

3.name: The Empress
3.upright: A time of growth, abundance, and creative flourishing — nurture yourself and those around you.
3.reversed: Creative energy is blocked or relationships feel smothering; reclaim your independence.

4.name: The Emperor
4.upright: Establish order and take charge; disciplined structure is the foundation of lasting success.
4.reversed: Control has become tyranny — examine where rigidity or power struggles are creating harm.

5.name: The Hierophant
5.upright: Seek wisdom from established traditions, mentors, or institutions as you navigate your path.
5.reversed: Question conventional wisdom and be willing to forge your own path beyond tradition.

6.name: The Lovers
6.upright: A meaningful union or significant choice aligns your values — choose with your whole heart.
6.reversed: Disharmony in a relationship or a misalignment of values demands honest reflection.

7.name: The Chariot
7.upright: Harness your will and drive forward — victory comes through discipline and focused determination.
7.reversed: Inner conflicts or loss of control are stalling your momentum; regain your focus.

8.name: Strength
8.upright: True power lies in compassion and patience — meet challenges with quiet courage rather than force.
8.reversed: Self-doubt and fear are undermining your confidence; reconnect with your inner strength.

9.name: The Hermit
9.upright: Step back from the noise and seek your own counsel; the light you need comes from within.
9.reversed: Excessive withdrawal is cutting you off from the world — balance solitude with connection.

10.name: Wheel of Fortune
10.upright: The wheel turns — embrace change and trust that cycles of fortune are shifting in your favor.
10.reversed: Resistance to change or bad luck keeps the wheel stuck; release control and adapt.

11.name: Justice
11.upright: Seek fairness and act with integrity — every action carries consequences, and truth will prevail.
11.reversed: Injustice or dishonesty is at play; examine where accountability is lacking.

12.name: The Hanged Man
12.upright: Willingly surrender control and allow a different vantage point to reveal a deeper truth.
12.reversed: Unnecessary delays or stubborn resistance are preventing the breakthrough you need.

13.name: Death
13.reversedKw: Resistance · Stagnation · Unable to move on
13.upright: An old chapter is closing; embrace this transformation, for it clears the way for rebirth.
13.reversed: Clinging to what must end causes stagnation — release the past and allow renewal.

14.name: Temperance
14.upright: Blend opposing forces with patience and moderation — harmony arises from measured, purposeful action.
14.reversed: Excess or imbalance is disrupting your equilibrium; restore harmony through mindful restraint.

15.name: The Devil
15.upright: You may be bound by obsession or unhealthy patterns — awareness is the first step to freedom.
15.reversed: You are beginning to break free from limiting bonds; reclaim your power and step into the light.

16.name: The Tower
16.reversedKw: Fear of change · Delayed collapse · Avoidance
16.upright: A sudden disruption shatters illusions, but the destruction clears ground for something more authentic.
16.reversed: You sense the coming upheaval but resist it — what must fall will fall; prepare rather than avoid.

17.name: The Star
17.upright: After darkness comes light — have faith in yourself and the universe; healing and renewal are here.
17.reversed: Loss of hope dims your light; seek small sources of inspiration to reignite your faith.

18.name: The Moon
18.upright: Unseen fears and illusions distort your perception — trust instincts but seek clarity before acting.
18.reversed: Confusion is beginning to lift; face your fears honestly and the path will become clearer.

19.name: The Sun
19.upright: Warmth, clarity, and success radiate in all directions — celebrate life and share your light freely.
19.reversed: Joy is momentarily obscured by clouds; trust that the sun still shines beyond the shadow.

20.name: Judgement
20.reversedKw: Self-doubt · Ignoring the call · Harsh judgment
20.upright: A profound awakening calls you to evaluate your past and rise into a higher version of yourself.
20.reversed: Fear of judgment prevents an important reckoning and renewal — answer the call.

21.name: The World
21.upright: A major cycle reaches its fulfilling conclusion — celebrate your achievement and prepare for the next journey.
21.reversed: Closure remains elusive; unfinished business holds you in place — address what is left undone.

22.name: Ace of Wands
22.reversedKw: False start · Delays · Lack of motivation
22.upright: A powerful spark of creative energy ignites a new beginning — seize this moment and take the first bold step.
22.reversed: Creative energy is blocked or misdirected; revisit your motivations and wait for clearer inspiration.

23.name: Two of Wands
23.reversedKw: Fear of the unknown · Playing it safe · Indecision
23.upright: You stand at the threshold of something greater — plan boldly and begin to expand your horizons.
23.reversed: Fear of stepping beyond the familiar keeps you small; take a calculated risk to move forward.

24.name: Three of Wands
24.upright: Your initial efforts are paying off — look ahead with confidence as opportunities expand on the horizon.
24.reversed: Progress is slower than hoped; patience and flexibility are needed to navigate current obstacles.

25.name: Four of Wands
25.reversedKw: Conflict at home · Instability · Suppressed joy
25.upright: A milestone worth celebrating — share this moment of joy, stability, and belonging with those you love.
25.reversed: Tensions at home or a sense that joy is being suppressed; create space for genuine celebration.

26.name: Five of Wands
26.upright: Competition and friction are pushing you to sharpen your edge — engage constructively, not combatively.
26.reversed: Conflict is being avoided rather than resolved; address disagreements honestly to release the tension.

27.name: Six of Wands
27.reversedKw: Fall from grace · Egotism · Private achievement
27.upright: Your efforts have earned well-deserved recognition — accept the praise graciously and inspire others.
27.reversed: Success has become tied to ego or external validation; find satisfaction in the work itself.

28.name: Seven of Wands
28.upright: You are under pressure from multiple directions — hold your ground with confidence; your position is worth defending.
28.reversed: Exhaustion or self-doubt is eroding your resolve; reassess whether the battle you're fighting is truly yours.

29.name: Eight of Wands
29.upright: Events are moving quickly — act decisively now, as this window of momentum will not stay open long.
29.reversed: Progress is frustratingly slow; identify what is causing the blockage and clear the way forward.

30.name: Nine of Wands
30.upright: You are battle-weary but nearly there — summon your last reserves of strength and cross the finish line.
30.reversed: Burnout and defensiveness make the final stretch harder than it needs to be; ask for help if needed.

31.name: Ten of Wands
31.upright: You are carrying too much alone — accomplish what must be done, then lighten your load by delegating.
31.reversed: The weight you carry is unsustainable; release some responsibility before breakdown occurs.

32.name: Page of Wands
32.upright: Youthful curiosity and boundless enthusiasm signal the start of an exciting creative adventure.
32.reversed: Enthusiasm without direction leads to scattered energy; focus before diving in.

33.name: Knight of Wands
33.upright: Charge forward with passion and confidence — this is a time for bold action and fearless pursuit.
33.reversed: Impulsive energy burns bright but burns out fast; channel your passion with greater intention.

34.name: Queen of Wands
34.upright: Lead with warmth and courage; your vibrant confidence attracts opportunity and inspires those around you.
34.reversed: Overextension or jealousy dims your natural radiance — return to your authentic self.

35.name: King of Wands
35.upright: Lead with vision and inspire others through bold action; your natural authority serves a greater goal.
35.reversed: Arrogance or impulsiveness undermines your leadership; temper boldness with wisdom and listening.

36.name: Ace of Cups
36.upright: A new emotional beginning wells up — open your heart to love, creativity, and intuitive connection.
36.reversed: Emotions are suppressed or creative flow is blocked; allow yourself to feel and express freely.

37.name: Two of Cups
37.upright: A meaningful connection deepens into a bond of mutual respect, love, and shared purpose.
37.reversed: A partnership is strained by imbalance or miscommunication — honest dialogue is essential.

38.name: Three of Cups
38.upright: Joy multiplies in community — celebrate your bonds with friends and let gratitude flow freely.
38.reversed: Overindulgence or group tensions are diluting the joy; rebalance and reconnect with genuine intimacy.

39.name: Four of Cups
39.upright: Pause and look inward — what appears as discontent may be inviting you to realign with what truly matters.
39.reversed: Withdrawal has served its purpose; you are now ready to re-engage with life's opportunities.

40.name: Five of Cups
40.upright: Grief is real and valid — allow yourself to mourn, but do not overlook what still stands behind you.
40.reversed: Healing is underway; accept what was lost and turn toward what remains and what is yet to come.

41.name: Six of Cups
41.reversedKw: Living in the past · Naivety · Releasing the past
41.upright: Fond memories bring warmth — revisit the past with gratitude, not longing.
41.reversed: The pull of nostalgia keeps you in yesterday; honor the past and release its hold.

42.name: Seven of Cups
42.upright: Imagination overflows with possibilities — be discerning, as not all that glitters leads to genuine fulfillment.
42.reversed: Confusion is clearing; you are ready to choose one path and commit with full focus.

43.name: Eight of Cups
43.upright: Something that once fulfilled you no longer does — walking away takes courage, but it honors your deeper calling.
43.reversed: You drift without direction; clarity of purpose is urgently needed to move forward.

44.name: Nine of Cups
44.upright: Your wish is within reach or has already arrived — savor this moment of deep satisfaction and gratitude.
44.reversed: External satisfaction masks an inner void; turn toward what truly nourishes the soul.

45.name: Ten of Cups
45.upright: A vision of lasting joy and emotional fulfillment is manifesting — cherish the bonds of love and community.
45.reversed: Family or relational harmony is disrupted; look honestly at what needs and values are going unmet.

46.name: Page of Cups
46.upright: A gentle, intuitive message arrives — stay open to unexpected inspiration and the wisdom of your emotions.
46.reversed: Emotional immaturity or self-pity is clouding your creative vision; nurture inner growth to move forward.

47.name: Knight of Cups
47.upright: Follow your heart with elegance and imagination — romance, creativity, and heartfelt offers are well-aspected.
47.reversed: Idealism shades into unrealistic expectations; ground your romantic vision in honest assessment.

48.name: Queen of Cups
48.upright: Lead with deep compassion and emotional intelligence — your intuitive care creates safety for those around you.
48.reversed: Emotional boundaries have blurred; ensure that nurturing others does not come at the cost of yourself.

49.name: King of Cups
49.upright: Mastery of the emotional realm brings wisdom and calm authority — lead with empathy and open-hearted generosity.
49.reversed: Suppressed emotions erupt as manipulation or volatility; return to the calm center of emotional mastery.

50.name: Ace of Swords
50.upright: A moment of piercing clarity cuts through confusion — speak your truth and act from clear understanding.
50.reversed: Muddled thinking or harsh words create chaos; slow down and seek clarity before taking action.

51.name: Two of Swords
51.upright: A difficult choice stands before you — gather more information before forcing a decision.
51.reversed: Excessive information or inner conflict prevents clear thinking; simplify and trust your gut.

52.name: Three of Swords
52.upright: Pain cuts deep, but it is honest — allow yourself to grieve fully, knowing this too shall pass.
52.reversed: The sharpest pain is softening; release what you have been holding and allow healing to begin.

53.name: Four of Swords
53.upright: Your mind and body need rest and recovery — step back from the battle and allow restoration.
53.reversed: Restlessness prevents true recovery; honor the body's signals and accept the necessity of rest.

54.name: Five of Swords
54.uprightKw: Conflict · Defeat · Winning at all costs
54.upright: Not every battle is worth winning — consider the cost of victory and whether conflict serves you.
54.reversed: An opportunity for reconciliation arises; release past resentments and seek peaceful resolution.

55.name: Six of Swords
55.upright: You are moving away from turbulence toward calmer ground — the journey may be bittersweet but necessary.
55.reversed: Unfinished emotional business prevents transition; face what must be resolved before moving on.

56.name: Seven of Swords
56.reversedKw: Coming clean · Imposter syndrome · Ending deception
56.upright: Strategic thinking is valuable now, but be careful that cleverness does not shade into deception.
56.reversed: A deception is coming to light; choose honesty and integrity to restore trust.

57.name: Eight of Swords
57.upright: The cage that holds you may be largely a mental one — question the beliefs that say you are powerless.
57.reversed: You are awakening to self-imposed limitations; one shift in perspective opens the door to freedom.

58.name: Nine of Swords
58.upright: Worry and anxiety are at their peak — the mind in the dark always magnifies fear beyond reality.
58.reversed: Deep-rooted fears demand honest attention; seeking help or support is a sign of strength.

59.name: Ten of Swords
59.reversedKw: Recovery · Rising again · Resisting the inevitable
59.upright: A painful ending has arrived — as devastating as it feels, the worst is now over and the sun will rise again.
59.reversed: Recovery is possible but hampered by resistance; accept what has ended and focus on rebuilding.

60.name: Page of Swords
60.upright: Approach the situation with sharp curiosity and an open mind — gather information before forming conclusions.
60.reversed: Hasty words or scattered thinking cause unnecessary damage; discipline your mind and choose words carefully.

61.name: Knight of Swords
61.upright: Move forward with sharp focus and decisive speed — momentum is everything now, but keep ethics in view.
61.reversed: Speed without direction leads to damage; slow down to ensure your actions align with your values.

62.name: Queen of Swords
62.upright: Cut through pretense with clarity and honesty — your sharp perception is a powerful gift when used with compassion.
62.reversed: Sharpness has curdled into cold criticism or bitterness; soften the blade with empathy.

63.name: King of Swords
63.reversedKw: Abuse of power · Manipulation · Cold tyranny
63.upright: Think clearly, speak honestly, and act with principled authority — intellectual integrity is your greatest strength.
63.reversed: Power is wielded without empathy or principle; reclaim ethical authority over your own thinking.

64.name: Ace of Pentacles
64.reversedKw: Missed opportunity · Poor planning · Financial loss
64.upright: A tangible new beginning arrives — plant the seed of this opportunity with care and it will grow into lasting abundance.
64.reversed: An opportunity is slipping away through inaction or poor planning; act before the window closes.

65.name: Two of Pentacles
65.upright: Manage your resources with flexibility and good humor — juggling multiple demands is sustainable if you stay nimble.
65.reversed: Too many plates are spinning and something is about to fall; prioritize ruthlessly and ask for help.

66.name: Three of Pentacles
66.reversedKw: Disorganization · Group conflict · Lack of teamwork
66.upright: Great work emerges from skilled collaboration — value each team member's contribution and learn from every exchange.
66.reversed: Poor coordination or egos are undermining collective effort; establish clear roles and mutual respect.

67.name: Four of Pentacles
67.upright: Prudent management of resources creates lasting security — hold what you have with care, not with fear.
67.reversed: Attachment to money or possessions has become excessive; generosity will release the grip of scarcity.

68.name: Five of Pentacles
68.reversedKw: Recovery · Finding support · End of hard times
68.upright: A period of material hardship tests your resilience — seek support, for help is closer than it appears.
68.reversed: The worst of the hardship is lifting; allow others to offer support as you begin to rebuild.

69.name: Six of Pentacles
69.upright: Wealth flows freely when shared wisely — give where you can and receive with gratitude.
69.reversed: Generosity is conditional or imbalanced; examine the power dynamics in your giving and receiving.

70.name: Seven of Pentacles
70.reversedKw: Impatience · Limited reward · Lack of vision
70.upright: You have invested well — pause to evaluate your progress, then continue with patient, sustained effort.
70.reversed: Short-term thinking or impatience is undermining a long-term endeavor; take the wider view.

71.name: Eight of Pentacles
71.upright: Commit to your craft with wholehearted dedication — mastery is earned through patient, repetitive excellence.
71.reversed: Perfectionism or lack of focus prevents real progress; find the joy in the practice itself.

72.name: Nine of Pentacles
72.upright: You have earned a level of abundance and independence worth savoring — enjoy the fruits of your disciplined effort.
72.reversed: Financial security masks deeper questions of self-worth; cultivate inner abundance alongside external success.

73.name: Ten of Pentacles
73.upright: Enduring prosperity and a meaningful legacy are within reach — invest in what lasts beyond the material.
73.reversed: The foundations of long-term security feel shaky; address financial or family instability before it deepens.

74.name: Page of Pentacles
74.upright: A new practical opportunity calls for focused study and diligent effort — commit to the learning process.
74.reversed: Procrastination or boredom stalls tangible progress; reconnect with the deeper purpose behind your efforts.

75.name: Knight of Pentacles
75.upright: Steady, methodical effort is the surest path to lasting results — commit to the daily work without complaint.
75.reversed: Excessive caution or inertia brings diminishing returns; be willing to step beyond your comfort zone.

76.name: Queen of Pentacles
76.upright: Warmth and practical wisdom create a thriving, abundant environment for yourself and those you love.
76.reversed: Overextension between work and home is causing burnout; prioritize self-care and restore equilibrium.

77.name: King of Pentacles
77.upright: Disciplined mastery of the material world creates lasting prosperity — lead with calm authority and practical wisdom.
77.reversed: Material success has become an end in itself; reconnect with purpose and generosity beyond mere accumulation.
